name: Superpowers (Claude Code)
description: Bring the Claude Code Superpowers skills library into OpenClaw, with optional auto-selection and prompt injection.
author: obra/superpowers (packaged for OpenClaw)

autoSelect.description: Auto-select a suitable superpowers skill based on the user prompt.

injectSkillText.description: Inject the selected skill guidance into the agent prompt context.

showTip.description: Show a short usage tip in prependContext each run (recommended).

maxInjectedChars.description: Max characters of SKILL.md to inject when auto-selected.

defaultSkill.description: Fallback skill when autoSelect is enabled but no strong match is found.
